title: Thai-Style Pan-Seared Tofu with Kanom Krok
description: A fusion of Thai flavors and crispy kanom krok, served with pan-seared tofu.

ingredients.name: Kanom krok batter mix
ingredients.notes: follow package instructions for water ratio

ingredients.name: Thai chili peppers
ingredients.notes: sliced or minced for added heat

instructions: 1. Prepare kanom krok according to package instructions.
2. Pan-fry tofu cubes in 1 cup of vegetable oil until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
3. In a small saucepan, combine Thai red curry paste, fish sauce (if using), palm sugar, and 2 tablespoons of water. Heat over low heat, whisking until smooth.
4. Add pan-fried tofu to the sauce and stir to coat.
5. Serve tofu with a side of kanom krok, garnished with chopped cilantro and sliced Thai chili peppers.
